simple_types.name: sfEventType
simple_types.code:
type sfEventType is
  (sfEvtClosed,
   sfEvtResized,
   sfEvtLostFocus,
   sfEvtGainedFocus,
   sfEvtTextEntered,
   sfEvtKeyPressed,
   sfEvtKeyReleased,
   sfEvtMouseWheelMoved,
   …,
   sfEvtCount);
